images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model embodying a Fairy Tale Forest theme within a high-end walk-in closet. The scene is illuminated by bright, clear reflections from a spinning disco ball, casting dynamic sparkles across her face and the luxurious surroundings without heavy shadows. The background is a softly blurred bokeh of organized racks and neon accents, rendered in a cinematic Teal and Orange color grade. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
